'''Snapdragon''' is a resource item.

==Products==
{{Uses material list|Snapdragon}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
Children are often disappointed that this plant does not resemble an actual dragon. There are no snapping motions in these colourful leaves, and a depressing lack of firebreathing lizards in the stems.
}}
